scripts.tauri:dev:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $msvcBase='C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\BuildTools\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC'; $msvcVer=Get-ChildItem $msvcBase -Directory | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if(-not $msvcVer){ throw 'MSVC tools not found. Install Visual Studio Build Tools (C++ build tools).'; }; $msvcBin=Join-Path $msvcVer.FullName 'bin\\Hostx64\\x64'; $kitBinRoot='C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Windows Kits\\10\\bin'; $kitVer=Get-ChildItem $kitBinRoot -Directory | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if(-not $kitVer){ throw 'Windows 10/11 SDK not found.'; }; $kitBin=Join-Path $kitVer.FullName 'x64'; $Env:Path = ($Env:USERPROFILE + '\\.cargo\\bin;' + $msvcBin + ';' + $kitBin + ';') + $Env:Path; npm.cmd run tauri dev }"
scripts.tauri:build:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $msvcBase='C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\BuildTools\\VC\\Tools\\MSVC'; $msvcVer=Get-ChildItem $msvcBase -Directory | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if(-not $msvcVer){ throw 'MSVC tools not found. Install Visual Studio Build Tools (C++ build tools).'; }; $msvcBin=Join-Path $msvcVer.FullName 'bin\\Hostx64\\x64'; $kitBinRoot='C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Windows Kits\\10\\bin'; $kitVer=Get-ChildItem $kitBinRoot -Directory | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if(-not $kitVer){ throw 'Windows 10/11 SDK not found.'; }; $kitBin=Join-Path $kitVer.FullName 'x64'; $Env:Path = ($Env:USERPROFILE + '\\.cargo\\bin;' + $msvcBin + ';' + $kitBin + ';') + $Env:Path; npm.cmd run tauri build }"
